hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Explain a work process step by step (first / then / next / after that / finally) -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- Describing a Simple Process -- Step by Step at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 15 -- Describing a Simple Process

listenings.text: Hi, I am Rachel. Let me explain a simple process we use in the office. It has five steps. First, open the document on your computer. Then, write a short summary of the meeting. Next, check your text for mistakes. After that, save the file with the correct name. Finally, send it to the team. The process is easy, and you only need a few minutes. If you forget a step, just start again and repeat it slowly.

Hello, this is Danilo. Let me describe how I run a simple data process every morning. First, I start my computer and open the data file. Then, I prepare the numbers and check them. Next, I run the report and wait a few minutes. After that, I save my work in a safe place. Finally, I complete the report and send it to my manager. The process has five stages, and I repeat it every day. It is simple, but each step is important.
